ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date of participant consent */,
  "consent_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consent form */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "compensation_type" TEXT /* Type of participant compensation */,
  "compensation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of participant compensation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Number of the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the session took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "trial_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trial type */,
  "trial_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the session */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of trial */,
  "target_stimulus" TEXT /* The target stimulus presented during the trial */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant in milliseconds */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response given by the participant */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Any comments about the trial */,
  "date_correction" TEXT /* Date when any corrections were made to the trial data */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor who corrected the data */,
  "processed" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the trial data has been processed */,
  "stimulus_onset_time" TEXT /* Time when the stimulus was presented */,
  "response_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the participant's response */,
  "response_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the participant's response */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the assessor */,
  "assessor_expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the assessor */,
  "assessor_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessor */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correction */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of correction made */,
  "correction_justification" TEXT /* Justification for the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the list */,
  "list_type" TEXT /* Type of list */,
  "list_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_lists" (
  "trial_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the list */,
  "trial_list_order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial within the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_lists_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_lists_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES lists ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
